Introduction
    Elvis All-Star Tribute is a TV movie starring Jennifer Lopez, Post Malone, and Lisa Marie Presley. A re-enactment by some of the music industry's biggest stars of Elvis Presley's 1968 NBC comeback special, in tribute to the King.
